title: Amirthakadeswarar Temple, Sakkottai
tagline: Amirthakadeswarar Temple, Sakkottai — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Amirthakadeswarar Temple (அமிர்தகடேஸ்வரர் கோயில், சாக்கோட்டை) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Sakkottai in Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Amirthakadeswarar Temple (அமிர்தகடேஸ்வரர் கோயில், சாக்கோட்டை) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deity Shiva, located at Sakkottai in Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva. Shiva is worshiped as Amirthakadeswarar, and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Amirthavalli Amman.

topPlaces.name: Karukudi Sargunalingeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Karukudi Sargunalingeswarar Temple (கருக்குடி சற்குணலிங்கேஸ்வரர் கோயில் )is a Hindu temple located at Karukudi in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The historical name of the place is Marudhanallur.

topPlaces.name: Sivapuram, Thanjavur
topPlaces.description: Sivapuram is a village in Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu. It is located 5 kilometres south-east of Kumbakonam.

topPlaces.name: Marudanallur
topPlaces.description: Marudanallur is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Malayappanallur
topPlaces.description: Malayappanallur is a village in the Kumbakonam taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sivagurunathaswamy Temple
topPlaces.description: Sivagurunathaswamy temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva located in the village of Aduthurai, Tamil Nadu, India. Shiva is worshipped as Sivagurunathaswamy, and is represented by the lingam.

topPlaces.name: Korukkai Brahma Gnana Pureeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Brahma Gnana Pureeswarar Temple is a Shiva temple in Tamil Nadu, India. The main deity in this temple is Brahma Gnana Pureeswarar and goddess is Pushpavalli alias Pushpambigai.

topPlaces.name: Tippirajapuram
topPlaces.description: Tippirajapuram is a village in Kumbakonam taluk, Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu. It is located near the banks of the river Cauvery in India.

topPlaces.name: Karuvalarcheri Agastheeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Karuvalarcheri Agastheeswarar Temple is a Hindu temple located at Karuvalarcheri in Thanjavur district of Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Amirthakadeswarar Temple, Sakkottai?
faq.a: The best time to visit Amirthakadeswarar Temple, Sakkottai is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Amirthakadeswarar Temple, Sakkottai?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (78 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (79 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Amirthakadeswarar Temple, Sakkottai?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Amirthakadeswarar Temple, Sakkottai at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Amirthakadeswarar Temple, Sakkottai?
faq.a: Stays in Amirthakadeswarar Temple, Sakkottai start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Amirthakadeswarar Temple, Sakkottai?
faq.a: The top attractions are Karukudi Sargunalingeswarar Temple, Sivapuram, Thanjavur, Marudanallur, Malayappanallur, Sivagurunathaswamy Temple.
